payload.additional_notes: Classic bedroom setup with a dark wood bed and matching nightstand; primary illumination from a table lamp beside the bed.
payload.image_summary: Right-side view of a bedroom showing a large wooden bed with striped pillows and blanket, a dark wooden nightstand topped by a table lamp, a narrow window/frame near center-left, and a light switch on the near left wall. Carpeted floor and gray painted walls.
